items.title: Android engineer leaves Google amid concerns over defense partnerships
items.summary: René Mayrhofer, a principal software engineer for Android Security and self-described pacifist and privacy advocate, has resigned from Google. The engineer had worked at Mountain View since 2017 but said he had become increasingly dissatisfied with what he se…
items.titleZh: 安卓工程师因担心国防合作关系而离开谷歌
items.summaryZh: RenéMayrhofer是Android Security的首席软件工程师，自称和平主义者和隐私倡导者，已从谷歌辞职。这位工程师自2017年以来一直在山景城工作，但他说他对自己的工作越来越不满意…

items.title: Six Surprisingly Human Stories About Aliens
items.summary: These stories about extraterrestrials all resonate here on Earth.
items.titleZh: 关于外星人的六个令人惊讶的人类故事
items.summaryZh: 这些关于外星人的故事都在地球上引起了共鸣。

items.title: Your iPhone is getting enhanced Bluetooth tracking with iOS 27
items.summary: One less-discussed iOS 27 feature announced at Apple's WWDC is support for Channel Sounding. Look for it whenever you see Bluetooth 6.3 devices.
items.titleZh: 您的iPhone正在通过iOS 27增强蓝牙跟踪功能
items.summaryZh: 在苹果WWDC上宣布的一个较少讨论的iOS 27功能是对Channel Sounding的支持。每当您看到蓝牙6.3设备时，请查找它。

items.title: Elon Musk, the trillionaire: pay packets go multi-planetary in SpaceX IPO
items.summary: The largest IPO in history raised $75 billion Friday despite $8.7B in losses since 2025. Did your pension boost the "significantly overvalued" stock?
items.titleZh: 亿万富翁埃隆·马斯克：在SpaceX首次公开募股中，薪酬将走向多个星球
items.summaryZh: 周五，尽管自2025年以来亏损87亿美元，但这是历史上最大的首次公开募股，筹集了750亿美元。你的养老金是否提振了“严重高估”的股票？

items.title: Judge extends block on $1.8B Trump 'Anti-Weaponization Fund'
items.summary: A federal judge in Virginia has extended a court-ordered block on the Trump administration’s creation and operation of a $1.8 billion settlement fund for compensating people who claim to be victims of a weaponized government. Acting Attorney General Todd Blan…
items.titleZh: 法官延长了对18亿美元特朗普“反武器化基金”的封锁
items.summaryZh: 弗吉尼亚州的一名联邦法官延长了法院对特朗普政府设立和运作18亿美元和解基金的禁令，该基金用于赔偿声称是武器化政府受害者的人。代理司法部长托德·布兰…

items.title: Walmart has a message for its 2.1 million workers: AI is going to improve your job, not take it: ‘Technology will power our future’
items.summary: Walmart is already using AI to design clothes and coordinate trucks—but the $967 billion grocery chain says humans “will lead” the transformation.
items.titleZh: 沃尔玛向其210万员工传达了一个信息：人工智能将改善你的工作，而不是接受它：“技术将为我们的未来提供动力”
items.summaryZh: 沃尔玛已经在使用人工智能来设计衣服和协调卡车，但这家价值9670亿美元的杂货连锁店表示，人类“将引领”这一转型。

items.title: Ex-Disney star Bridgit Mendler says being rejected hundreds of times by Hollywood gives her the same ‘traditional background’ as other space CEOs
items.summary: Bridgit Mendler says her success is fueled by a “very high tolerance for risk”—thanks, in part, to her experience as a Disney Channel star.
items.titleZh: 前迪士尼明星布里奇特·门德勒表示，被好莱坞拒绝数百次，让她拥有与其他太空公司首席执行官相同的“传统背景”
items.summaryZh: 布里奇特·门德勒说，她的成功得益于“对风险的高度容忍”，这在一定程度上要归功于她作为迪士尼频道明星的经历。
